baseline_scan.dead_output_disposition: Both are schema-required Single outputs of TopK and cannot be omitted under full ONNX checker.

explored.idea: replace masked float16 rank payloads with uint8 positional ranks
explored.reason: ONNX checker passes but ORT CPU has no TopK uint8 kernel in either required mode
exact bias translation, superseded by initializer CSE
one alias, superseded by exact x2 scaling with two aliases

scatter_gating: The cost-7529 -1 base gate is already the smallest safe typed carrier found: one [1,3] float16 output. Moving the gate to final [1,18] indices or adding Mod/Clip increases official memory.
permutation_initializer: Empirical best_perm support was narrower, but the full 6-permutation initializer was retained because no all-generator formal proof justified pruning it.
